name: User Cooling Setpoint Configured Range
description: The device shall publish the maximum and minimum allowed User Cooling Setpoint values.

data.name: User Cooling Minimum Allowed Setpoint in Fahrenheit x 10
User Cooling Maximum Allowed Setpoint in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: High confidence: Configured range for user cooling setpoint; min/max in Fahrenheit x10. Divide by 10 for degF.

name: User Temperature Setpoint Limit Configurable Bitmap
description: The device will publish which User Temperature Setpoint Limits are configurable. All reserved bits shall be cleared

data.name: User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limit is Configurable
User Heating Setpoint Maximum Limit is Configurable
User Cooling Setpoint Minimum Limit is Configurable
User Cooling Setpoint Maximum Limit is Configurable

comment: Medium confidence: Read-only bitmask indicating which temperature setpoint limits are user-configurable.

name: User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limit Request
description:
The client can request a change to the User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limit. Only User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limits that the device allows will be accepted.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets this Erd to 0x7FFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.

data.name: User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limit Request in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: Medium confidence: Writable user heating setpoint minimum limit request; assumed DegreesFx10.

name: User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limit Allowed Range
description: The device shall publish the range of values that are allowed for the User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limit

data.name: User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limit - Minimum Allowed Value in Fahrenheit x 10
User Heating Setpoint Minimum Limit - Maximum Allowed Value in Fahrenheit x 10

comment: Medium confidence: Read-only allowed range for user heating setpoint minimum limit; assumed DegreesFx10.

name: Heat System Mode Fan Setting Status
description: The device shall publish the current Fan setting for the appliance when it is in Heat System Mode
comment: High confidence: Fan setting for heat system mode status; YAML enum: 0=Low, 1=High. Paired with request ERD 0x7719.

name: Heat System Mode Fan Setting Request
description:
The client can request a change to Fan setting that the appliance uses when in Heat System Mode. Only Fan settings that the device allows will be accepted.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets this Erd to 0xFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.
comment: High confidence: Fan setting request for heat system mode; write 0=Low, 1=High. Paired with status ERD 0x7718.

name: Heat System Mode Available Fan Settings
description: The device shall publish which Fan Settings are supported by the appliance when it is in Heat System Mode. All reserved bits shall be cleared.
comment: High confidence: Read-only bitmask of available fan settings for heat mode.

name: Fan System Mode Fan Setting Status
description: The device shall publish the current Fan setting for the appliance when it is in Fan System Mode
comment: High confidence: Fan setting for fan-only system mode status; YAML enum: 0=Low, 1=High. Paired with request ERD 0x771c.

name: Fan System Mode Fan Setting Request
description:
The client can request a change to Fan setting that the appliance uses when in Fan System Mode. Only Fan settings that the device allows will be accepted.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets this Erd to 0xFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.
comment: High confidence: Fan setting request for fan-only mode; write 0=Low, 1=High. Paired with status ERD 0x771b.

name: Fan System Mode Available Fan Settings
description: The device shall publish which Fan Settings are supported by the appliance when it is in Fan System Mode. All reserved bits shall be cleared.
comment: High confidence: Read-only bitmask of available fan settings for fan-only mode.

name: Cool System Mode Fan Setting Status
description: The device shall publish the current Fan setting for the appliance when it is in Cool System Mode
comment: High confidence: Fan setting for cool system mode status; YAML enum: 0=Low, 1=High. Paired with request ERD 0x771f.

name: Cool System Mode Fan Setting Request
description:
The client can request a change to Fan setting that the appliance uses when in Cool System Mode. Only Fan settings that the device allows will be accepted.
Whether or not the request was accepted, the appliance resets this Erd to 0xFF as an indication the request was 'consumed' and have it ready for the next request.
comment: High confidence: Fan setting request for cool mode; write 0=Low, 1=High. Paired with status ERD 0x771e.

name: Cool System Mode Available Fan Settings
description: The device shall publish which Fan Settings are supported by the appliance when it is in Cool System Mode. All reserved bits shall be cleared.
comment: High confidence: Read-only bitmask of available fan settings for cool mode.

name: Refrigerant Leak Sensor Critical Leakage Error
description:
Used to report leak sensor detection of leaks greater than a parametrically
defined value. If present, will shutdown compressor and set a fan to run
constantly until manual intervention.
